homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.
prompts.1: How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends hip-hop and electronic elements with a groovy bassline and syncopated percussion. A repetitive vocal sample drives the steady rhythm within a chill, relaxed atmosphere suitable for background music.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track serves as a horror soundtrack built upon a slow tempo and steady percussive rhythm. A haunting keyboard harmony rises above the foundation to create an eerie, ominous atmosphere filled with tension. The dark and dramatic mood makes the piece highly effective for setting suspense in movies or video games.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features prominent synthesizers, electronic drums, and a pulsating bassline that drive the medium tempo forward. The music evokes a futuristic and trippy atmosphere, fitting the space-themed mood while maintaining an energetic drive. Ideally suited for a video game soundtrack, the piece blends computer-generated textures with cinematic qualities to create a dynamic soundscape.

A female vocal layer adds a narrative element to the groovy arrangement, creating an engaging and dynamic listening experience. The piece blends simple instrumentation with an energetic, danceable mood characteristic of electronic pop styles.

The overall vibe suits a sci-fi soundtrack or an electronic dance setting perfectly.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends dark, intense synthesizers with a driving four-on-the-floor beat to create an energetic atmosphere. The prominent bassline and electronic drums build a sense of urgency, making the music ideal for a nightclub or rave setting where people are dancing. While it carries the deep house style of the original release, the arrangement focuses heavily on rhythm and sound design rather than melody.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
